title: Differential Privacy
summary: A technique used to protect the privacy of individuals in a dataset by adding noise to the data. It sits inside Privacy & Security / Data Privacy Techniques. Compare it with Differential Privacy Techniques and Differential privacy logs. It opens into Differential privacy logs and Differential Privacy in FL.
